title: NullPointerException on tab close
description: Browser crashes with NullPointerException when closing the last tab while a download is in progress
root_cause: Race condition between download manager and tab lifecycle
suggested_fix: Guard tab teardown with a mutex and wait for download handles to release

title: Memory leak in image decoder
description: Long browsing sessions accumulate memory when many PNG images are decoded
root_cause: Decoded image buffers not released after tab discard
suggested_fix: Explicitly free ImageSurface in nsImageDecoder::Finalize

title: SSL handshake fails with TLS 1.3
description: Connections to some servers fail with SEC_ERROR_BAD_SIGNATURE when TLS 1.3 is enabled
root_cause: Incorrect signature scheme fallback for RSA-PSS
suggested_fix: Update NSS to include RSA-PSS negotiation fix

title: HTTP 500 on empty POST body
description: Apache returns 500 when POST body length is zero and mod_proxy is enabled
root_cause: Uninitialized buffer passed to ap_get_client_block
suggested_fix: Initialize request buffer to empty string before proxy dispatch

title: Log rotation drops entries
description: Access log entries are lost during nightly logrotate SIGUSR1 reload
root_cause: Non-atomic file descriptor swap during rotation
suggested_fix: Use dup2 to atomically swap fd inside worker

title: mod_ssl segfault on renegotiation
description: Server segfaults during client-initiated SSL renegotiation under high load
root_cause: Double-free of SSL context after handshake
suggested_fix: Protect ctx free with ref-count in ssl_engine_kernel.c

title: IDE freezes when opening large XML
description: Workspace freezes for 30+ seconds when opening XML files larger than 10 MB
root_cause: Full DOM parse on UI thread
suggested_fix: Switch to SAX-based lazy parser and load on background thread

title: Autocomplete missing for Java generics
description: Content assist does not suggest bounded generics for nested type parameters
root_cause: ASTResolver ignores wildcard bounds
suggested_fix: Extend TypeBinding.resolveGenerics to include wildcard bounds

title: Git plugin OOM on large repo
description: EGit throws OutOfMemoryError when cloning repositories over 2 GB
root_cause: PackFile fully loaded into memory
suggested_fix: Stream pack objects instead of full load

title: Login form accepts SQL injection
description: Login endpoint vulnerable to ' OR 1=1 -- payloads
root_cause: String concatenation used to build SQL query
suggested_fix: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements

title: Dashboard chart not rendering on Safari
description: Sales chart is blank on Safari 15 but works on Chrome and Firefox
root_cause: Missing Safari polyfill for ResizeObserver
suggested_fix: Add resize-observer-polyfill and load before chart init

title: Password reset email never sent
description: Users report not receiving password-reset emails after clicking Forgot Password
root_cause: SMTP relay rejects unauthenticated sender
suggested_fix: Configure SPF/DKIM and use authenticated SMTP account

title: API rate-limit returns 500 instead of 429
description: Rate-limited API responses return HTTP 500 with stack trace exposed
root_cause: Rate limiter middleware raises unhandled exception
suggested_fix: Catch RateLimitExceeded and return 429 with Retry-After header

title: File upload accepts executables
description: Server accepts .exe and .sh via upload endpoint
root_cause: No MIME type validation
suggested_fix: Whitelist safe MIME types and reject others

title: Video playback stutters on 4K
description: H.264 playback stutters when hardware acceleration is disabled
root_cause: Software decoder single-threaded
suggested_fix: Enable multi-threaded ffmpeg software decoding

title: .htaccess rules ignored after upgrade
description: Custom RewriteRule directives no longer apply after upgrading to 2.4.58
root_cause: AllowOverride default tightened
suggested_fix: Set AllowOverride All in vhost or move rules to server config

title: Debugger disconnects randomly
description: Java debugger disconnects when stepping over long-running native calls
root_cause: JDWP timeout too short for native frames
suggested_fix: Increase JDWP request timeout to 60s in preferences

title: Session cookie missing HttpOnly
description: Session cookies issued without HttpOnly and Secure flags
root_cause: Cookie configuration defaults not overridden
suggested_fix: Set HttpOnly

title: Bookmarks lost after profile migration
description: Bookmarks disappear when migrating profile from v102 to v115
root_cause: Schema migration script skips places.sqlite backup
suggested_fix: Add pre-migration backup and integrity check

title: Reverse proxy strips X-Forwarded-For
description: X-Forwarded-For header removed when mod_remoteip is enabled
root_cause: Trusted proxy list empty by default
suggested_fix: Configure RemoteIPTrustedProxy directive
